front: Describe the role of selenoproteins in antioxidant defense.
back: Selenoproteins include glutathione peroxidases (GPx1-8) and thioredoxin reductases (TrxR1-3). They reduce H2O2 and lipid hydroperoxides using glutathione or thioredoxin. Selenocysteine in the active site is essential for catalysis.
